'''Ferdas''' served as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was the captain of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] during a raid on an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] base.<ref name="Death" /> He was eventually replaced by [[Lorth Needa/Legends|Lorth Needa]] as the commanding officer of the ''Avenger''.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|264|Ferdas, Captain}}</ref>
